description: This file is a Next.js page component for displaying resident profiles. It includes a static parameter generation function for pre-rendering specific resident pages and an asynchronous React component that fetches resident ID params and renders a ResidentProfileClient component.

methods.name: generateStaticParams
methods.description: Generates a list of resident IDs for static site generation in Next.js.

methods.name: ResidentProfilePage
methods.description: Main React component that retrieves resident ID from params and renders the ResidentProfileClient component.
